properties.name: system-auth.max-skew-seconds
properties.description: Allowed timestamp skew window in seconds.

properties.name: system-auth.nonce-key-prefix
properties.description: Redis key prefix for nonce replay protection.

properties.name: system-auth.default-sign-version
properties.description: Default X-Agent signature version used for request signing.

properties.name: system-auth.x-agent-key
properties.description: Local app_id used for outbound X-Agent system auth signing.

properties.name: system-auth.local-secret
properties.description: Local secret used for outbound X-Agent signature calculation.
